tasks.subject: Task 1: Create digitization project paper artifact
tasks.description: Create module-2-notebooklm-gemini/examples/01-project-paper-pendigitalan-rekod.md — a Malay Kertas Cadangan with disclaimer, 8 ## sections, phases table, scenario facts. Verify: grep -c '^## ' = 8.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create records-committee meeting transcript artifact
tasks.description: Create module-2-notebooklm-gemini/examples/02-mesyuarat-jk-rekod-transcript.md — Malay transcript, 4 named speakers, >=3 decisions + >=3 actions with officer+date. Verify: >=6 speaker turns.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Generate meeting audio from transcript
tasks.description: Create generate_audio.py (per-speaker macOS say voices, afconvert to m4a) and commit the generated 02-mesyuarat-jk-rekod-audio.m4a. Verify: script runs, afinfo shows non-zero duration.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Write examples README (scenario hub)
tasks.description: Create module-2-notebooklm-gemini/examples/README.md — scenario paragraph, artifact->lab table, disclaimer, working links. Verify: file exists + contains 'Seri Aman'.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Promote MOH guideline in public-references.md
tasks.description: Modify public-references.md — named primary MOH guideline entry (PDF URL [verify]) + kkm.synchronet.my fallback + TLS/USB note + checklist USB bullet. Verify: greps for guideline title and kkm.synchronet.my.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Point Lab 1 setup at the MOH guideline
tasks.description: Modify lab/01-set-up-notebook.md — Step 4 names the MOH guideline, Seri Aman framing + notebook name, substitute note, keep screenshots/tip/Next link. Verify: greps 'Seri Aman' + 'public-references.md'.

tasks.subject: Task 7: Tailor Lab 2 queries to the MOH guideline
tasks.description: Modify lab/02-query-the-corpus.md — 3 scenario questions answerable from guideline, keep citation step+screenshot, update follow-ups. Verify: grep 'tempoh penyimpanan'.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Wire Lab 3 to the project-paper artifact
tasks.description: Modify lab/03-project-paper-to-slides.md — upload ../examples/01-project-paper-pendigitalan-rekod.md, substitute note, refine prompt references real section. Verify: grep link + file exists.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Wire Lab 4 to the meeting audio/transcript
tasks.description: Modify lab/04-meeting-audio-to-minutes.md — upload ../examples/02-mesyuarat-jk-rekod-audio.m4a (transcript fallback), name meeting Bil 2/2026, keep prompts/warning/screenshot/Next. Verify: grep link + m4a exists.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Anchor Lab 6 prompts to the scenario
tasks.description: Modify lab/06-explore-further.md — memo prompt announces project to Pengarah, summarize prompt = Lab 3 paper, Audio Overview = MOH guideline, keep challenge section + warning. Verify: grep 'pendigitalan'.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Final consistency & link verification
tasks.description: Run the link checker over the 5 edited labs + examples/README.md; fix BROKEN; spot-check Next links + README lab map. Verify: link-checker prints PASS.
